description: 145 - 24-03-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Kumar lyer (Ambassador and Permanent Representative, UK Mission to the WTO, UN
text:
(Ambassador and Permanent Representative, UK Mission to the WTO, UN

and Other International Organisations (Geneva))

From: Kumar IverlPersonal
Sent: Mon 24/03/2025 7:31:32 AM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson Personal
Ce: Washington Private Office Personal
Subject: Re: Potential visit to DC w/c 9th June.
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Thanks, Peter.

Office / Team do let me know who | should work with. | am likely to start in NYC and
visit DC on Thurs 12th and Fri 13th June

Thanks,

Kumar

Kumar Iyer CMG

Director General

Foreign Commonwealth & Development Office
Personal

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Monday, March 24, 2025 12:08 am
To: Kumar lyer
Cc: Washington Private Office
Subject: Re: Potential visit to DC w/c 9th June.

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
I would be delighted. Office copied in. Best Peter

Get Outlook for iOS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Kumar lyer
Sent: Saturday, March 22, 2025 6:04:11 PM
To: Peter Mandelson
Subject: Potential visit to DC w/c 9th June.

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Dear Peter,
I have recently been confirmed as the UK’s next Ambassador to the UN & WTO in 
Geneva (a bit more detail here) and will be visiting Barbara and the team in New York 
w/c 9th June. I wanted to get your advice on whether it could be possible to visit 
Washington at the same time?
As with most things across the world at the moment, the US is key to the changes we 
are about to see across the multi-lateral system and it would be genuinely valuable to 
speak to those aligned to our views (e.g. on the Hill and think tanks) as well as those 
less so before I take up my role in the summer.
I appreciate how busy things must be so completely understand if this isn’t possible 
but if it is then please do let me know who I might be able to work with at the mission.
With thanks,
Kumar
________________________________________________________________________________
___________
Kumar Iyer CMG
Director General
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | King Charles St | London | SW1A 2AH
Tel: 
 | Email:
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Personal
Personal
432
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
